mnemonics.title: BMS Components
mnemonics.content: SCA: Sensors collect, Controllers compute, Actuators act - Senses → Decisions → Actions

mnemonics.title: BMS Benefits
mnemonics.content: CODES: Comfort, Optimization, Data, Energy savings, Sustainability

mnemonics.title: Control System Types
mnemonics.content: DDC: Digital Direct Decision-making - Direct Digital Control replaces old pneumatic systems

acronyms.usage: Computer-based system controlling building equipment for efficiency and comfort
Alternate name for BMS, emphasizes automation aspect
Microprocessor-based control method for building systems
Standard communication protocol for building systems interoperability
Climate control systems managed by BMS
HVAC system that varies air supply based on zone demand
Software for monitoring and optimizing energy consumption
Automated system for identifying equipment problems
Intelligent feature that identifies malfunctions by comparing actual vs expected performance

visualTips.visualization: Draw a triangle: Sensors at bottom (input), Controllers in middle (processing), Actuators at top (output) - with communication network as the base connecting all three
Circle diagram: Sensor measures → Controller compares to setpoint → Actuator adjusts → Sensor measures again (continuous feedback loop)
Pie chart showing typical building energy: HVAC 40-50%, Lighting 20-30%, Equipment 15-25%, Other 10-15% - BMS primarily targets HVAC and lighting
Layered pyramid: BACnet at top, then application layer, network layer, data link layer, physical layer at bottom

analogies.analogy: BMS is like the nervous system of a building - sensors are nerves collecting information, controllers are the brain processing it, and actuators are muscles taking action
DDC controller is like a smart thermostat - it reads temperature (sensor), compares to desired (setpoint), and turns AC on/off (actuator) automatically
Integrated BMS is like a orchestra conductor - each subsystem (instrument) can play alone, but integration allows coordinated, efficient performance
Energy management in BMS is like a fitness tracker - it monitors consumption (steps), analyzes patterns (sleep), and suggests optimizations (exercise)
